The first release of data on value of shipments at the national level occurred on March 23rd, 2021. The time series starts with reference month January 2021. Data on value of shipments for refined products are not published at the provincial or territorial level.
The Institut de la Statistique du Québec is responsible for the collection and processing of mineral production data from Quebec respondents on a monthly basis.
